'''thadata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabbeka|sabbeka]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabbeka|sabbeka]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thadata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thædætæth|thædætæth]] || [[word:thædætæj|thædætæj]] || [[word:thædætæsh|thædætæsh]] || [[word:thædætæ|thædætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadadatath|thadadatath]] || [[word:thadadataj|thadadataj]] || [[word:thadadatash|thadadatash]] || [[word:thadadata|thadadata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadatath|thadatath]] || [[word:thadataj|thadataj]] || [[word:thadatash|thadatash]] || [[word:thadata|thadata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadaftath|thadaftath]] || [[word:thadaftaj|thadaftaj]] || [[word:thadaftash|thadaftash]] || [[word:thadaftaf|thadaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thadatatha|thadatatha]] || [[word:thadataja|thadataja]] || [[word:thadatasha|thadatasha]] || [[word:thadataka|thadataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thadatath|thadatath]] || [[word:thadataj|thadataj]] || [[word:thadatash|thadatash]] || [[word:thadata|thadata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thadatathal|thadatathal]] || [[word:thadatajal|thadatajal]] || [[word:thadatashal|thadatashal]] || [[word:thadatakal|thadatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thadatathatha|thadatathatha]] || [[word:thadatajaja|thadatajaja]] || [[word:thadatashasha|thadatashasha]] || [[word:thadataka|thadataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thadatathan|thadatathan]] || [[word:thadatajan|thadatajan]] || [[word:thadatashan|thadatashan]] || [[word:thadatakan|thadatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thadatathaoro|thadatathaoro]] || [[word:thadatajaoro|thadatajaoro]] || [[word:thadatashaoro|thadatashaoro]] || [[word:thadatakaoro|thadatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
